mapper.select:
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, WRITER, ( SELECT COUNT(FILE_NUM) FROM FILES F WHERE F.IDX = B.IDX ) FILESCOUNT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD B
AND MENU_ID = #{ menu_id }
AND ${searchType} Like '%' || #{ keyword } || '%'
ORDER BY IDX DESC OFFSET #{ offset } ROWS FETCH NEXT #{ numOfRows } ROWS ONLY
